## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Code follows project style (`ruff check`, `black`, `prettier`)
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if this change affects user-facing behavior)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials are included in this PR
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commit format](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
